q: Internal friction in fluids is called ___.
For example, sea breeze is a laminar flow and storm is a ___ flow.
The mass flowing in section 1 must equal the mass flowing in section 2. Hence, volume flow rate $\frac{V}{t}$ is the ___ throughout the pipe.
The equation $A_1 v_1 = A_2 v_2$ states that the liquid entering one end of the pipe leaves from the other end with a constant ___ flow rate.
The larger the area of the pipe, the ___ is the speed.
The speed of water spraying from a hose increases by making the hose area ___.
